overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a Hellenistic city at golden hour. The character traverses from a mosaic courtyard past a circular monument, through a garden, and up a grand stone staircase as the light transitions toward dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with mosaic pavement alongside ancient building

events.description: character turns right to follow the building facade
moving from open courtyard to narrow path alongside building

agents.ego_description: walking along the building facade, passing decorative columns and golden doors

notable_agents.action: civilian sitting against the building wall
guard standing near the golden doors

entered.detail: large ornate golden doors with geometric patterns on the building facade
intricate black and white geometric mosaic tile floor
tall stone wall with decorative carved moldings
ornate circular stone column base with relief carvings
tall narrow evergreen tree against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit courtyard with intricate mosaic flooring, passing a seated civilian and approaching large golden doors on a historic stone building. The camera follows closely as the character turns right to follow the building facade, with decorative architectural elements visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: path alongside building with view of circular monument

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt path to grassy garden area
tree foliage temporarily obscures view of circular monument

agents.ego_description: walking along the path with the circular monument visible ahead on the right

notable_agents.action: distant figures walking near the monument base

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with decorative lattice work and columns
wooden wheeled cart with vegetation loaded on it
unpaved dirt path alongside the building

segments.scene_description: Walking along the building exterior on a dirt path, the character passes a wooden cart and views an impressive circular monument with intricate stonework rising on the right. The environment transitions from paved courtyard to garden as grass appears underfoot, with cypress trees lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden area with trees and flower beds between stone structures

events.description: character adjusts path to approach the stone staircase
approaching the base of the grand stone staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden grass toward the stone stairs in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of civilians sitting on a low wall in the garden

entered.detail: mature leafy trees providing shade over the grass
tall stone wall marking the garden boundary
flowering shrubs and plants along the building edge
distant stone structures visible beyond the garden

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a lush garden area with grass underfoot and mature trees providing dappled shade. Flower beds line the left side while a stone retaining wall borders the right. In the distance, other figures sit on walls, and the character heads toward a grand stone staircase visible through the greenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase leading to upper terrace

events.description: sunlight shifts to create longer shadows as character ascends
character reaches the top of the stairs and continues onto the terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the long stone staircase toward the upper level, passing another character descending

notable_agents.action: civilian in green tunic descending the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn surfaces flanked by walls
tall stone wall bordering the left side of the stairs
tall stone wall bordering the right side of the stairs
geometric mosaic pavement at the top of the stairs
large stone urn with fire burning inside on the upper terrace
stone building facade with columns at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by high walls, passing a descending civilian. The lighting shifts to a deeper golden hour with the sun behind the character. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens to an upper terrace with mosaic flooring, burning urns, and views of the building facade ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Hellenistic complex that transitions from an intimate mosaic courtyard into an expansive upper terrace at dusk. It begins by following the character across intricate mosaic flooring toward golden doors, before turning right to trace the facade of a historic stone building. As the paved ground gives way to a dirt path, the camera passes a wooden cart and a towering circular monument, with the environment shifting into a lush garden filled with cypress trees and dappled shade. The scene then flows past flower beds and stone retaining walls toward a grand staircase, which the character ascends as the lighting deepens into a rich golden hour. Finally, the movement culminates at the top of the stairs, opening onto an upper terrace adorned with burning urns and mosaic floors.
